title: Kitfo Royale
desc: Minced beef, nitir kibe (spiced butter), mitmita spice. Served raw, rare, or medium-rare.

title: Golden Dorowet
desc: Authentic spicy chicken stew (doro wet) with red onions, nitir kibe, berbere, and boiled egg.

title: Injera Platter Beyayentu
desc: Colorful combination of vegetarian (Misir, Shiro, Gomen) and meat wots on a single injera.

title: Special Tegabino Shiro
desc: Velvety, simmered chickpea and pea flour (Shiro), spiced butter, chili, red onion.

title: Classic Burger Combo
desc: Juicy grilled beef patty, tomato, lettuce, special sauce. Served with crispy fries.

title: Artisanal Pizza Margarita
desc: Hand-stretched dough, fresh tomato sauce, mozzarella, basil, olive oil.

title: Ethiopian Macchiato
desc: Strong local espresso layered with velvety steamed milk. Classic SGS taste.

title: Fresh Fruit Juice Mix
desc: Refreshing blend of local fruits (Avocado, Papaya, Mango). No sugar added.

title: Local St. George Beer
desc: Enjoy a crisp, cold bottle of Ethiopia's favorite beer (Bati or George).

title: Premium Spiced Tea (Shai)
desc: Warming black tea infused with local spices (Cardamom, Cinnamon, Cloves).
